## XEventListeners type

Map type of every [XEvent](./x-components.xevent.md) and a callback with the payload and metadata for that event.

<b>Signature:</b>

```typescript
export declare type XEventListeners = Partial<{
    [Event in XEvent]: (payload: XEventPayload<Event>, metadata: WireMetadata) => unknown;
}>;
```
